title: Hub Spoke Stress
subtitle: Designed hub-spoke map with many spokes, external links, governance controls, and operating notes

items.label: Solid spokes
items.value: primary managed relationship through the hub

items.label: Dashed spokes
items.value: optional, exception, or external relationship requiring extra review

items.label: Orange accent
items.value: transformation path, dependency, or operational handoff

info_panels.title: Use Cases
items: Find the approved source package for a domain, CTQ, or defect class.
Trace a reusable module back to its controlled source and owner.
Identify external or optional dependencies before reuse in another product line.

items.label: Owner
items.value: hub owner maintains routing rules and stale-link reports

items.label: Quality gate
items.value: new module cannot be published without source and approval evidence

items.label: Cadence
items.value: weekly automation check; monthly architecture review

annotations.text: Stress template: designed hub-spoke maps should stay legible with many spokes, dashed relationships, and bottom operating panels.
